_doc: UC-5 demo fixtures — 8 original incidents + 50 new = 58 incidents; 3 original requests + 50 new = 53 requests. New tickets (DEMO_INC_009+ and DEMO_SR_004+) are in 'new' state with category/priority/group left null so UC-5 triage proposes them. Production paths use itsm.incident / itsm.request in Postgres; this file is read by JsonFixtureStore for tests + demo only.

incidents.title: VPN keeps dropping at Mumbai DC
incidents.description: Every 10 minutes the tunnel drops on the gateway in Mumbai. Affects approximately 15 engineers in the office. Restarting the client works for another 10 minutes then drops again.

incidents.title: Cooling unit alarm in rack row B12
incidents.description: CRAC unit on row B12 reporting high return temperature. Hot aisle climbing past 32C. Risk of thermal trip on top-of-rack switches if not addressed.

incidents.title: Outlook not syncing new emails for finance team
incidents.description: Inbox updates delayed by over 20 minutes for finance users. Emails arrive but with significant delay. Calendar invites also slow. Started after the morning Exchange cluster patch.

incidents.title: Postgres replication lag exceeding 5 minutes on reporting replica
incidents.description: wal_sender on primary shows backed-up segments. Reporting queries returning stale rows. No alerts from monitoring. Started during overnight batch.

incidents.title: Azure AD SSO sign-in loop for marketing team
incidents.description: After password reset, users in the marketing OU get redirected back to the login page repeatedly. SAML assertion appears valid in the logs. Affects roughly 20 users.

incidents.title: Wildcard certificate expiring on intranet portal
incidents.description: *.intra.corp expires in 12 days. Auto-renewal via ACME failed because the DNS challenge record was deleted in last week's cleanup. Need to re-enable.

incidents.title: Database deadlock spike on payroll application
incidents.description: Concurrent payroll updates are causing deadlocks on the SQL server. Finance users blocked from running month-end close.

incidents.title: MS Teams meetings drop after 45 minutes
incidents.description: Calls hosted by Sales VP get force-disconnected at the 45-minute mark consistently. Other teams unaffected. Hourly meetings break the customer demo flow.

incidents.title: VPN authentication failures after MFA rollout
incidents.description: Users on the new Microsoft Authenticator policy are getting 'auth failed' on the corporate VPN. Mobile push prompt arrives but VPN tunnel refuses. Affects ~40 remote engineers across NA region. Worked yesterday before the MFA policy push.

incidents.title: Wi-Fi handoff drops between floors 4 and 5
incidents.description: When laptops move from 4F to 5F the Wi-Fi session drops for ~15 seconds then re-associates with a different SSID. RADIUS logs show successful re-auth but session token regenerates causing app re-login.

incidents.title: DNS resolution timing out for *.internal.corp
incidents.description: Every ~30 seconds nslookup against the internal resolver fails with timeout. Affects payroll-app, hr-portal, and the build pipeline. Public DNS works fine. dig shows SERVFAIL on the secondary.

incidents.title: Switch port flapping on rack B12-top-of-rack
incidents.description: Port Gi1/0/24 on the TOR switch in rack B12 is showing up/down every 30-60s. Connects to the storage gateway. Cable was reseated yesterday. Spine logs show LACP renegotiating.

incidents.title: Outlook search returns no results for users on new Exchange node
incidents.description: Users migrated to Exchange node 3 last weekend can't search their mailboxes. Index rebuild was attempted but Search Foundation Service crashes after 2 minutes. Other nodes unaffected.

incidents.title: Exchange transport queue backing up — 30k messages pending
incidents.description: Hub transport on EXG-HUB-02 has 30,847 messages in submission queue. Growing at ~100/min. SMTP receive connectors look healthy. Suspected backend mailbox database lock.

incidents.title: Calendar invites from external senders bouncing with 550 5.4.1
incidents.description: External meeting invites from gmail.com and outlook.com bouncing back. SPF and DMARC look fine on dig. Internal mail flows OK. Started yesterday afternoon ~3pm IST.

incidents.title: Postgres primary failover triggered — replica promoted unexpectedly
incidents.description: RDS Aurora cluster auto-failed over at 02:14 UTC. Primary is healthy but cluster endpoint now points at old replica. App connections seeing read-only writes failing.

incidents.title: MySQL replication broken on reporting cluster — Seconds_Behind_Master = NULL
incidents.description: Replica IO thread stopped with 'got fatal error 1236 from master'. Binlog gtid mismatch. Last successful sync was 6 hours ago. Reporting dashboards showing stale data.

incidents.title: Postgres autovacuum stuck on orders table for 12 hours
incidents.description: pg_stat_progress_vacuum shows phase=scanning heap, heap_blks_scanned=0 since 14:00 yesterday. Table is 480GB. Other autovacuum workers running fine. Blocking ALTER TABLE that was queued.

incidents.title: Active Directory replication failure between London and Tokyo DCs
incidents.description: repadmin /showrepl shows 'access denied' between LON-DC01 and TKY-DC01. Last successful inbound sync was 14h ago. Tokyo users seeing stale group memberships.

incidents.title: SSO redirect loop on Salesforce — OIDC token rejected
incidents.description: Users clicking 'Login with Corp SSO' on Salesforce land back at the IdP. ID token issued but Salesforce returns 'invalid_audience'. JWKS endpoint looks healthy. Started after IdP cert rotation overnight.

incidents.title: Password reset emails not reaching some users — Office365 quarantine
incidents.description: Self-service password reset emails from Okta land in O365 quarantine for ~30% of users. Tenant allowlist already includes the Okta sender domain. Anti-phishing policy may be evaluating SPF strict.

incidents.title: MacBook M3 fleet bricking after BIOS firmware update
incidents.description: 12 of 80 MacBooks in the design team failed to boot after this morning's MDM firmware push. Stuck at apple logo with progress bar. DFU restore not working.

incidents.title: USB-C dock not detecting external monitors after macOS update
incidents.description: Users on macOS 14.7 with the standard Anker USB-C dock can't see external displays. USB peripherals through the same dock work. Tried different cables, same result.

incidents.title: Office printer queue backing up on FLOOR-3-PRT-01
incidents.description: Print jobs accepted but never released. 84 jobs queued. Restarting the print spooler service brings it back for ~10 minutes then jams again. PaperCut server shows OK.

incidents.title: Adobe Creative Cloud activation failing — license server unreachable
incidents.description: Design team can't activate Photoshop / Illustrator. Error: 'Could not contact licensing server.' Network and DNS look fine. Adobe status page shows green. Possibly proxy whitelist drift.

incidents.title: Microsoft Teams freezing during screen share — Windows 11 only
incidents.description: Windows 11 users hit a freeze 1-2 minutes into screen share. Mac and web client unaffected. Latest Teams version installed. GPU acceleration toggle didn't help.

incidents.title: Slack desktop client constantly disconnecting and reconnecting
incidents.description: Mac and Windows Slack clients show 'Trying to reconnect...' every few minutes. Browser client stays connected. Possibly Cisco Umbrella DNS filtering enterprise.slack.com.

incidents.title: Backup job for production fileserver failing — Veeam 'unable to allocate processing resources'
incidents.description: Nightly Veeam job for FS-PROD-01 failing for last 3 nights with 'unable to allocate processing resources.' Other jobs on the same proxy succeed. Disk space looks fine.

incidents.title: S3 backup uploads timing out from EU region
incidents.description: Cross-region S3 backups from eu-west-1 to us-east-1 timing out at 60s. Smaller files succeed. Larger than 100MB fails. Other AWS services from same VPC work fine.

incidents.title: NAS quota suddenly full on /shared/marketing
incidents.description: Marketing team's NAS share reporting full despite logical usage being 60% of quota. NetApp aggregate utilisation also healthy. Possibly snapshot retention misconfigured.

incidents.title: Phishing email impersonating CFO reached 200 mailboxes
incidents.description: Targeted phishing email pretending to be from CFO requesting urgent wire transfer was delivered. Existing DKIM/DMARC allowed it through. Need to recall and adjust filters.

incidents.title: Malware detected on developer workstation — TrickBot variant
incidents.description: EDR flagged TrickBot on DEV-LT-0184. Workstation isolated. Need IR investigation: lateral movement, exfiltration check, full re-image. User had admin rights.

incidents.title: Suspicious login activity — 50 failed logins from Russia on CEO account
incidents.description: SIEM alert: 50 failed login attempts on CEO account from IPs in RU within 10 minutes. Conditional access blocked them. Need user notification + account lockout review.

incidents.title: Salesforce reports timing out — single-record loads OK
incidents.description: Salesforce 'Pipeline 2026' report times out at 5 minutes. Loading a single opportunity is fast. May be Apex governor hit; recent custom field added to the report.

incidents.title: SAP HANA query performance degraded — SELECT on FIN_LEDGER 60× slower
incidents.description: Finance team reporting SAP slow since this morning. SELECT * from /1bcdwb/v_finledger went from 2s to 120s. No schema changes overnight. Memory utilisation looks normal.

incidents.title: ServiceNow portal returning 500 on submit
incidents.description: End users submitting tickets via the ServiceNow self-service portal get 500 error after click. Backend logs show 'transaction quota exceeded'. Other ServiceNow workflows work.

incidents.title: Jira Cloud workflow transition button hidden for some projects
incidents.description: PRJ-CORE board missing the 'Move to In Review' transition button for 6 of 12 users. Permission scheme looks correct. Browser cache cleared with no change.

incidents.title: Kubernetes cluster API server intermittently returning 503
incidents.description: kubectl commands intermittently fail with 'server is unable to handle the request' on prod-east cluster. etcd leader stable. API server metrics show high latency on POST /pods.

incidents.title: Datadog agent missing on 12 production nodes
incidents.description: Datadog dashboard 'Production Fleet' missing data from 12 of 240 nodes. ssh shows datadog-agent service inactive. Last ansible run was clean. Likely missed in last config push.

incidents.title: Cooling unit alarm in DC-MUM rack row C
incidents.description: CRAC C-12 in Mumbai DC alarming high return air temp 33C. Aisle climbing. Risk of TOR thermal trip. Facility team paged.

incidents.title: Power redundancy lost on rack B14 — only A-side PDU active
incidents.description: B-side PDU on rack B14 (storage) tripped. Currently single-PDU operation. Need facility electrician to investigate breaker and restore redundancy before maintenance window.

incidents.title: AC degraded on one floor — laptops overheating in conference rooms
incidents.description: Floor 4 conference rooms reporting ambient temp 28C+. Multiple laptop overheating shutoffs during morning standups. Facility team notified.

incidents.title: CI/CD pipeline failing — Docker registry pull rate-limited
incidents.description: GitHub Actions builds failing intermittently on 'pulling from docker.io: rate limit exceeded'. Need to migrate to internal mirror or upgrade Docker Hub plan.

incidents.title: Terraform Cloud runs queued for 30 minutes — agent pool stuck
incidents.description: Terraform Cloud workspace 'infra-prod' runs queued past 30 min. Agent pool shows 0 of 4 agents busy. Possibly agent service crashed on the EC2 hosts.

incidents.title: AWS console MFA failing for org admin — virtual MFA token expired
incidents.description: Org admin can't log into AWS console; MFA prompt says 'invalid code'. Virtual MFA seed possibly drifted. Break-glass account needed to re-enrol.

incidents.title: CRM portal returning 504 for all read operations
incidents.description: Internal CRM portal at crm.internal returning 504 Gateway Timeout on all reads. Writes hang then time out. Backend service has CPU at 100%.

incidents.title: Internal Confluence wiki search returning zero results
incidents.description: Confluence search broken since this morning. Index status shows 'unhealthy'. Reindex job failed at 40%. Users can browse pages directly via URL.

incidents.title: Zoom dial-in numbers not connecting from India
incidents.description: Zoom audio dial-in for the IN region failing with 'call could not be completed.' Other regions work. Possibly carrier outage; raise with Zoom support.

incidents.title: GitLab webhook delivery failing to internal Jenkins
incidents.description: Push events from GitLab not triggering Jenkins jobs. Webhook delivery log shows 'connection refused.' Network ACL was modified yesterday — likely culprit.

incidents.title: New laptop image missing certificates — corporate Wi-Fi rejects auth
incidents.description: Laptops shipped from this week's Win11 image build can't join corp Wi-Fi. RADIUS rejects with 'unknown client cert.' Image possibly missing the latest CA bundle.

incidents.title: Sentry error rate spike — payment service NullPointerException on checkout
incidents.description: Sentry alert: payment-svc throwing NPE in OrderProcessor.applyDiscount on 8% of checkouts. Started after deploy of v3.42.1. Rollback in progress.

incidents.title: Internal CA expired — TLS warnings across multiple services
incidents.description: Internal CA (corp-ca-root) expired at 00:00 UTC. All services using internal certs throwing TLS warnings. Need root cert rotation + chain redistribution.

incidents.title: OneDrive sync stuck for finance team folder
incidents.description: OneDrive client on finance team Macs stuck at 'looking for changes' for 8 hours. Resetting client doesn't help. Folder is ~80GB.

incidents.title: Jenkins agent disconnects every 15 minutes
incidents.description: Jenkins build agent jenkins-agent-12 disconnects every ~15 min. Other agents stable. Possible JVM OOM; heap dump shows class loader leak after redeploy plugin run.

incidents.title: Asset discovery scan missed servers in DC-FRA subnet
incidents.description: Lansweeper discovery missed 14 of 60 servers in DC-FRA 10.42.5.0/24. SNMP credentials match. Could be ACL on the discovery scanner host.

incidents.title: CMDB CI relationship graph not loading — Neo4j heap exhausted
incidents.description: CMDB UI 'Relationships' tab spinning forever. Neo4j logs show 'GC overhead limit exceeded.' Heap configured 8GB. May need to increase or prune relationship history.

incidents.title: Splunk indexer reporting 100% disk on hot tier
incidents.description: Splunk hot tier on idx-03 at 100%. Hot-to-warm rolling delayed. Searches on recent data failing. Need urgent capacity or buckets to be aged off.

incidents.title: Production load balancer health check failing for orders-api
incidents.description: ALB health checks for orders-api returning 503 from 2 of 6 targets. Targets are healthy individually. Could be a stale target registration or recent ASG instance.

requests.title: MacBook Pro M3 Max for new ML engineer
requests.description: Need MacBook Pro M3 Max with 64GB RAM for a new joiner starting Monday in the data science team. Standard developer image plus CUDA tooling.

requests.title: Onboarding bundle for 3 new sales hires
requests.description: Need standard sales kit for three new joiners: laptop, Salesforce license, VPN access, Slack invite, and corporate phone.

requests.title: VPN access for new joiner — Bangalore office
requests.description: Standard VPN credentials for new engineering joiner in Bangalore. Start date next Tuesday.

requests.title: New joiner kit — Senior Backend Engineer, Bangalore
requests.description: Standard backend engineer kit: MacBook Pro M3 16GB, external monitor 27", USB-C dock, mechanical keyboard, JetBrains license, GitHub Enterprise access, AWS dev account, Slack invite, VPN credentials. Start date Monday.

requests.title: Production AWS read-only access for new SRE
requests.description: Read-only IAM role on prod-account for the new SRE engineer joining Monday. Needs CloudWatch, EC2 describe, S3 list, and RDS describe. No write permissions. Member of GRP-SRE.

requests.title: Salesforce CRM license for new sales rep — Western region
requests.description: Sales Cloud Enterprise license + Western region territory assignment. Reports to John Doe. Should see his region's accounts only. Start date next week.

requests.title: Tableau Server access for new analyst on finance dashboards
requests.description: Tableau viewer access to the 'Finance KPIs 2026' workbook for new analyst Jane R. No publishing rights, just view + export.

requests.title: Production database read access for new analytics team
requests.description: Read-only access to the analytics replica (analytics-ro.corp) for 3 new data analysts. Queries should hit the replica only, not primary.

requests.title: Slack admin rights for new platform engineer
requests.description: Workspace admin rights in the engineering Slack workspace for new platform eng joining the SRE team. Will manage channels and integrations.

requests.title: VPN access — Sydney office
requests.description: Standard VPN credentials for new joiner in Sydney office. Engineering team. Start date in 2 weeks. Standard split tunnel profile.

requests.title: MFA hardware token replacement for VP Engineering
requests.description: VP Engineering lost YubiKey on travel. Need replacement YubiKey 5C + revoke old token + re-register on AWS, Okta, GitHub.

requests.title: Office 365 license upgrade — E3 → E5
requests.description: Marketing lead Sarah K needs E5 license upgrade for advanced threat protection and Power BI Pro included. Budget code approved.

requests.title: New distribution list — eng-platform-announce
requests.description: New DL eng-platform-announce@corp. Members: all platform team (15 people). Used for low-volume announcements. Owner: Platform Eng Lead.

requests.title: AD group membership — add 5 users to GRP-PROD-DEPLOY
requests.description: Add the 5 listed engineers (full names in description) to GRP-PROD-DEPLOY for prod deployment access. Manager approval attached.

requests.title: Conference room booking system access for facilities admin
requests.description: New facilities admin needs admin access to the conference-room booking system for handling overrides + maintenance windows.

requests.title: Replace cracked laptop screen — MacBook Pro
requests.description: Cracked screen on MBP M2 (serial CWWXXXXXX) belonging to David L. AppleCare not active. Replacement quote and turnaround needed.

requests.title: Issue new corporate phone for sales director
requests.description: iPhone 15 Pro for new sales director onboarding next week. Standard MDM enrollment + corporate apps profile. International data plan.

requests.title: New monitor + ergonomic accessories for WFH setup
requests.description: Engineer requesting Dell U2723QE 27" 4K monitor, ergonomic vertical mouse, and adjustable laptop stand for WFH setup. Manager approved.

requests.title: Standing desk for finance director — RSI accommodation
requests.description: Finance director has RSI; occupational health recommended standing desk. Need procurement + installation in office.

requests.title: GitHub Enterprise seat for new contractor
requests.description: GitHub Enterprise seat for 3-month contractor doing frontend work. Member of GRP-EXTERNAL. SSO via Okta. Expiry to align with contract end.

requests.title: Notion workspace member upgrade — collaborate plan
requests.description: Upgrade Notion seat for the design team lead from member to workspace owner so she can manage permissions on the design library.

requests.title: Adobe Creative Cloud license — All Apps for new designer
requests.description: Senior product designer onboarding needs Adobe CC All Apps license. SSO + named user license. Cost code: DESIGN-2026.

requests.title: Power BI Pro for finance team — 8 users
requests.description: Power BI Pro licenses for 8 finance team members so they can publish dashboards. Currently on Power BI Free. Budget approved.

requests.title: Increase mailbox quota for legal team — 100GB
requests.description: Legal team mailboxes hitting 50GB cap and bouncing inbound mail. Increase quota to 100GB for the 6 legal team members.

requests.title: New shared mailbox for hr-international@corp
requests.description: Create hr-international@corp shared mailbox. Members: HR team + 3 regional HR leads. Used for international relocation cases.

requests.title: Calendar resource booking for new conference room — Tokyo Floor 8
requests.description: New conference room TKY-F8-CONF-A needs to be added to Exchange resource calendar. Capacity 12. AV equipment list attached.

requests.title: Add new IP range to corp VPN split-tunnel allow list
requests.description: New vendor SaaS at 198.51.100.0/24 should route via VPN tunnel not internet. Add to split-tunnel allow list. Vendor: ACME Analytics.

requests.title: Public IP allocation for new VPN concentrator at DR site
requests.description: New backup VPN concentrator at DR site needs 1 public IPv4 allocated from corp ARIN block + DNS A record corp-vpn-dr.corp.

requests.title: Firewall rule — allow inbound 443 from CloudFlare to lb-public
requests.description: Add WAF inbound rule: 443/tcp from CloudFlare published ranges to lb-public 10.0.1.5. Required for the new public marketing portal.

requests.title: Procure 50 USB-C to HDMI adapters for office hot-desks
requests.description: Office facilities request: 50 USB-C to HDMI adapters for hot-desk setups across 3 floors. Brand standardization preferred.

requests.title: Procurement — 200 ergonomic mice for office refresh
requests.description: Office refresh project needs 200 Logitech MX Master 3S mice for distribution to all in-office staff. Approved by COO.

requests.title: Renew 100 Microsoft Visio licenses — expiring next week
requests.description: Visio Plan 2 licenses for 100 architects + engineers expiring in 7 days. Need 1-year renewal before lapse.

requests.title: Renew Snyk security scanning subscription — annual
requests.description: Snyk Open Source + Code subscription up for renewal. 80 dev seats. Procurement to engage vendor on multi-year discount.

requests.title: New SharePoint site for the M&A project
requests.description: Create new SharePoint site 'project-titan-2026' restricted to M&A team (8 members). Custom permissions, no external sharing.

requests.title: Confluence space for new product team — Platform Insights
requests.description: New Confluence space 'Platform Insights' for the just-launched Platform Insights team. Owner: PM Alex K. Default permissions: team members edit, all corp read.

requests.title: Move 2TB legal hold dataset to long-term Glacier storage
requests.description: Legal hold dataset for closed case CASE-2024-0042 needs to move from S3 standard to Glacier Deep Archive. ~2TB. Retention 7 years.

requests.title: Decommission old Okta application — legacy expense tool
requests.description: Legacy expense tool sunset last quarter; remove from Okta SSO catalog + deprovision all users. Migration to new tool completed.

requests.title: Offboard — terminated employee, immediate revocation
requests.description: Employee terminated effective today. Revoke all access immediately: AD account disable, mailbox to manager, laptop wipe pickup, badge revoke, MFA tokens. HR has approved.

requests.title: Offboard — voluntary resignation, 2-week notice
requests.description: Senior engineer resigning, last day 2 weeks out. Plan offboarding: SSH key revoke, GitHub access change, knowledge transfer Confluence checklist, equipment return arrangements.

requests.title: Internal transfer — engineer moving to platform team
requests.description: Engineer transferring from product team to platform team next week. Update AD groups, Slack channels, Jira boards, oncall rotations. Manager change to Platform Eng Lead.

requests.title: Provision sandbox AWS account for engineering experimentation
requests.description: New AWS sandbox account under engineering OU for experimentation. Spending limit $1000/mo. SSO mapped to GRP-ENG. Auto-shutdown of idle resources.

requests.title: Setup new Azure subscription for marketing analytics POC
requests.description: Marketing analytics team running 3-month POC on Azure Synapse. Create new subscription under marketing-pocs RG, limit $5000, owner: marketing analytics lead.

requests.title: Datadog dashboard share with vendor SRE team
requests.description: Share 'Production Healthcheck' Datadog dashboard read-only with our vendor's SRE team (3 named users). Their corp domain attached.

requests.title: New PagerDuty schedule for the database team
requests.description: Create PagerDuty rotation 'db-team-oncall' with weekly handoffs. 5 named members + escalation to platform lead after 15 min.

requests.title: Slack channel archive — completed project channels (qty 12)
requests.description: Archive 12 completed project Slack channels (list attached). Members notified. Channel history retained for compliance.

requests.title: Zoom large meeting add-on — quarterly all-hands
requests.description: Need Zoom Large Meeting (1000 participants) add-on for the quarterly all-hands next Friday. Single-event only.

requests.title: Procure dev laptop image refresh — Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
requests.description: Refresh dev laptop OS image to Ubuntu 24.04 LTS with corporate baseline (CIS hardening, EDR, Okta SSO, dev tools).

requests.title: Renew SSL certificate for marketing.corp (public site)
requests.description: Marketing.corp wildcard cert expires in 30 days. Renew via DigiCert, install on CloudFront + WAF, update certificate pinning monitor.

requests.title: Domain renewal — corp-archive.com for 5 years
requests.description: Renew corp-archive.com domain registration for 5 years via the corporate registrar. Auto-renew on. Reminder set on calendar.

requests.title: New static IP for office-FRA branch internet — vendor change
requests.description: Frankfurt office switching ISPs. Need new static IPv4 + IPv6 allocated, firewall config updated, DNS records flipped during scheduled cutover window.

requests.title: Add SAML metadata for new SaaS — DocSign integration
requests.description: New SaaS DocSign needs SAML SSO. Upload corp IdP metadata to DocSign + map attributes (email, groups). Initial test users: 5 legal team.

requests.title: API key rotation for production payment gateway integration
requests.description: Payment gateway annual key rotation per PCI policy. Generate new API key, update prod config + secrets manager, monitor traffic, revoke old key after 24h.

requests.title: Procurement — bulk laptop order, 30 units for Q3 hiring
requests.description: Bulk laptop order for Q3 hiring: 20 MacBook Pro 14" M3, 10 Dell XPS 13. Standard corporate image. Lead time ~3 weeks. Cost code APPROVED-Q3-HIRING.
